page_title: Fullmetal Alchemist: Daughter of the Dusk
text:
Fullmetal Alchemist: Daughter of the Dusk (Tasogare no Shōjo 黄昏の少女) is an action game developed by Square Enix for Wii. Just like its predecessor Fullmetal Alchemist: Prince of the Dawn, it was never released outside Japan.

Characters

Edward Elric
Alphonse Elric
Claudio Rico
Elena Fiori
Roy Mustang
Riza Hawkeye
Winry Rockbell
Alex Louis Armstrong
Petr Hildebrand
Scar
Envy
